title: Just Small Swords
description: This texture pack makes all of the swords smaller while keeping the vanilla textures.
body:
This texture pack simply makes all of the swords smaller while keeping the same vanilla textures unlike most other small sword texture packs.

**Before**
![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3379841c7e687bf529f9e08608b04d596d510de.png)
**After**
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/866dac63f0e2be4cc70ebc0b76f83beb36315de6.png)
